description: Process the offboarding of senior developer Sarah Chen (username: schen) in Snipe-IT (http://localhost:8000, login: admin/password). Check in her four assigned assets (ASSET-SC01, ASSET-SC02, ASSET-SC03, and ASSET-SC04) with the note 'Returned via offboarding - Sarah Chen departure'. Set the status for ASSET-SC02 to 'Out for Repair' and the status for the remaining three assets to 'Ready to Deploy'. After checking in all assets, delete Sarah Chen's user account. Do not modify any other users or assets in the system.

metadata.expected_note: Returned via offboarding - Sarah Chen departure
